notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Ben Rice GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Paul Goldschmidt out at 2nd. Ben Rice out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Aaron Judge. Luis Rengifo scores.
